ModMetaData.name: RimWorld Performance
ModMetaData.author: Xeinaemm
ModMetaData.description:
Functionality - Redesigned hauling, capable of handling tens of thousands of things at once. Hauling 12k things takes ~5 mins for 10 pawns. - Tick tweaks, that save >100 TPS in late game by reducing number of game operations. - (WIP) Construction/Deconstruction
Compatible mods: - Allow Tools - mod automatically adjust to haul urgently, no need for Haul+ - Combat Extended - Any Extended Storage mod Incompatible mods: - Pick Up and Haul - similar idea, but PUAH isn't late game optimized or huge scale - Any mod that changes tick functionality - Any "smart" construction/deconstruction mod
Troubleshooting - Enable debug mode in Options/Mod Options/RimWorld Performance. - Extract player.log from Options/General/Log file folder and report it on GitHub. - Remember to disable debug mode aftewards.
Steam: GitHub:https://github.com/Xeinaemm/RimWorldPerformance
